items.title: Collaborative Custody Providers
items.description: Comparison of three collaborative custody approaches. All use multisig so you retain sovereign control; none can unilaterally spend your funds.

items.title: Stowaway
items.description: Stowaway is a collaborative transaction privacy feature in Samourai Wallet based on PayJoin (BIP-78). Two users construct a transaction together, breaking the common-input-ownership heuristic.
